# TrialLand — Full agent reference

> TrialLand is a marketplace for human-verified free trials. An agent claims a non-transferable promo code on behalf of a World ID–verified human — one per human, per trial. Partners only ever receive a hashed copy of the code plus an anonymous nullifier, never the raw code or the person's identity.

## Core concepts

- **Proof of Human**: A World ID credential proving a unique living person is behind the request. It is the account — not an email an agent can mint at will.
- **Nullifier**: A per-human, per-trial identifier. The same human claiming the same trial always collides, enforcing one-per-human without tracking the person across trials.
- **Idempotent claims**: Re-running a claim for the same human + trial returns the same code, never a new one.
- **Non-transferable**: Codes are bound to the human who authorized the agent and re-verified at redemption, so they can't be resold, shared, or replayed.

## Authentication

All requests use a partner/agent API key plus a World ID session that proves a unique human authorized the run.

- `Authorization: Bearer <TRIALLAND_KEY>`
- Body field `on_behalf_of`: a World ID session token (Proof of Human).

## Endpoints

### POST /v1/claims
Claim a trial on behalf of a verified human.

Request:
    {
      "trial": "perplexity",
      "on_behalf_of": "<worldid_session>"
    }

Response (200):
    {
      "code": "PERP-V8UZ-PCU4",
      "code_hash": "0xa9cdb2…",
      "nullifier": "0x55e454…",
      "transferable": false,
      "status": "issued"
    }

### POST /v1/redemptions
Redeem an issued code on the partner. Re-presents the human proof; if the human doesn't match the code owner, redemption fails.

### GET /v1/trials
List available trials, perks, and trial lengths.

## Code samples

### SDK (TypeScript)
    import { TrialLand } from "@trialland/sdk"

    const tl = new TrialLand({ apiKey: process.env.TRIALLAND_KEY })

    // Claim a trial on behalf of a verified human
    const claim = await tl.claims.create({
      trial: "perplexity",
      onBehalfOf: worldIdSession, // World ID Proof of Human
    })

    console.log(claim.code) // PERP-V8UZ-PCU4 (non-transferable)

### curl
    curl -X POST https://api.trialland.dev/v1/claims \
      -H "Authorization: Bearer $TRIALLAND_KEY" \
      -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
      -d '{
        "trial": "perplexity",
        "on_behalf_of": "<worldid_session>"
      }'

### CLI
    # Hand to your Claude Code, Codex, or Cursor agent.
    npm install -g @trialland/cli
    trialland login --key tl_live_your_key

    trialland claim perplexity \
      --on-behalf-of worldid_session_abc123

### MCP
    {
      "mcpServers": {
        "trialland": {
          "command": "npx",
          "args": ["-y", "@trialland/mcp"],
          "env": { "TRIALLAND_KEY": "tl_live_your_key" }
        }
      }
    }

### Skill
    ---
    name: claim-trial
    description: Claim a human-verified free trial on TrialLand on behalf of the current user.
    ---

    Use the TrialLand API to claim a non-transferable trial code.
    1. Confirm a World ID Proof of Human session for the user.
    2. POST /v1/claims with { trial, on_behalf_of }.
    3. Return the issued code. Re-runs are idempotent — same human, same code.

## Privacy model

Partners receive only the SHA-256 hash of the code and the anonymous nullifier plus redemption status. No personal data ever leaves the user's device, and TrialLand never sees the partner's plaintext code at redemption.
